title: No Elytra Boosts
description: Prevent elytra boosting with fireworks, wind charges and riptide.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4988c52ab5e3c1dbb479b1f886648ee0a289827.webp)

Prevent elytra boosting with fireworks, wind charges and riptide. Trying it anyway sets the item on cooldown for a moment and shows a `Elytra boosting is disabled.` message.

This is a very simple plugin without any permissions or commands, but it might be expanded in the future.
